TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Mabuwakay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 484 buwan, 1,344 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 388 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 956 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 26%, Truku 2%, Tayan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mabuwakay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Mabuwakay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Mabuwakay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mabuwakay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Mabuwakay hya' ga gnaalu. tay 'llaw na Mabuwakay hya' ga Cikeliwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ maβuwakaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, tajan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na maβuwakaj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na maβuwakaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na maβuwakaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na maβuwakaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na maβuwakaj ħjaʔ ɣa ɣnaalu. taj ʔllaw na maβuwakaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨikeliwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Mabuwakay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 484 buwan, 1,344 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 388 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 956 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 26%, Truku 2%, Tayan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mabuwakay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Mabuwakay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Mabuwakay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mabuwakay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Mabuwakay hya' ga gnaalu. tay 'llaw na Mabuwakay hya' ga Cikeliwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ maβuwakaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, tajan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na maβuwakaj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na maβuwakaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na maβuwakaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na maβuwakaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na maβuwakaj ħjaʔ ɣa ɣnaalu. taj ʔllaw na maβuwakaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨikeliwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
